ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hacking_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the hacking session in minutes */,
  "bytes_transferred" REAL /* Amount of data transferred during the session in MB */,
  "kali_trace_used" INTEGER /* Indicates whether Kali Linux was used for tracing (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "servers_corrupted" REAL /* Number of servers corrupted during the session */,
  "pages_corrupted" INTEGER /* Number of web pages corrupted during the session */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the session originated */,
  "wpm_typing_speed" REAL /* Typing speed during the hacking session in words per minute */,
  "hack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific hack performed */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hacking session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hacking session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session originated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., ongoing, completed, interrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hacking_sessions_hack_id FOREIGN KEY ("hack_id") REFERENCES hacks ("hack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hacking_sessions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country where the session originated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* City within the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hacks" (
  "hack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hack */,
  "hack_name" TEXT /* Name of the hack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hack */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hack */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the hack */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the hack information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who should receive the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., potential breach, suspicious activity) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES hacking_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session for which the report is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who requested the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, in progress) */,
  "report_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES hacking_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_threat_level" TEXT /* Predicted threat level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prediction */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_threat_level FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_threat_level") REFERENCES threat_levels ("threat_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_levels" (
  "threat_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat level */,
  "threat_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the threat level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_companies" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client company */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the client company has */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_companies_subscription_type FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_type") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription per month */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features included in the subscription */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Validity period of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_users" (
  "client_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client company the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security manager, IT specialist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_companies ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "client_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., viewed report, triggered alert) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_access_logs_client_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_user_id") REFERENCES client_users ("client_user_id")
)
